fields.name: icon
fields.label: Admin Icon
fields.description: Icon name for admin UI

fields.name: hasOptions
fields.label: Has Predefined Options
fields.description: Whether this type uses answer options (vs free text)

fields.name: validationPattern
fields.label: Validation Regex
fields.description: Optional regex for validation

fields.name: flowId
fields.label: Flow ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this flow

fields.name: introVideo
fields.label: Intro Video
fields.description: Background video shown on the intro screen

fields.name: conditionKeyword
fields.label: Condition Keyword
fields.description: The main condition/pain point (e.g., 'back pain', 'headaches') for dynamic text

fields.name: internalName
fields.label: Internal Name
fields.description: Admin-friendly name for this step

fields.name: secondarySubheadline
fields.label: Secondary Subheadline
fields.description: Additional subheadline text shown below the main intro

fields.name: audioNotice
fields.label: Audio Notice
fields.description: Notice about audio/volume requirements

fields.name: questionText
fields.label: Question Text
fields.description: Supports variables like {previousAnswer}, {keyword}

fields.name: avatarResponse
fields.label: Avatar Response
fields.description: What the avatar says when this option is selected. Supports {thisAnswer}, {previousAnswer}, etc.

fields.name: avatarEmotion
fields.label: Avatar Emotion
fields.description: Voice emotion when speaking this response

fields.name: nextStepOverride
fields.label: Skip to Step (Optional)
fields.description: Step ID to jump to (for branching logic)

fields.name: terminateFlow
fields.label: Terminate Flow
fields.description: End the flow with a termination message if this option is selected

fields.name: terminationMessage
fields.label: Termination Message
fields.description: Message shown when flow is terminated (avatar script)

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Tags
fields.description: For analytics/categorization

fields.name: scriptText
fields.label: Avatar Script
fields.description: What the avatar says. Supports variables.

fields.name: secondaryScriptText
fields.label: Secondary Script
fields.description: Additional script section for multi-part monologues

fields.name: tertiaryScriptText
fields.label: Tertiary Script
fields.description: Third script section for extended monologues

fields.name: emotion
fields.label: Emotion
fields.description: Voice emotion when speaking this script

fields.name: avatarEmotionOnSubmit
fields.label: Avatar Emotion (Submit)
fields.description: Voice emotion when email is submitted

fields.name: avatarEmotionOnSkip
fields.label: Avatar Emotion (Skip)
fields.description: Voice emotion when email is skipped

fields.name: videoId
fields.label: Video ID
fields.description: ID of the video to play (from VIDEO_REGISTRY, e.g., 'answer-summary')

fields.name: introText
fields.label: Intro Text
fields.description: Opening text before the dynamic summary

fields.name: outroText
fields.label: Outro Text
fields.description: Closing text after the dynamic summary

fields.name: empathyMessage
fields.label: Empathy Message
fields.description: Empathetic follow-up message after summary

fields.name: emailCTAMessage
fields.label: Email CTA Message
fields.description: Call-to-action message for email capture

fields.name: summaryMappings
fields.label: Summary Mappings (JSON)
fields.description: JSON object mapping step IDs to answer values to summary text

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
